message.content:
{
  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of a Carrier 19XR series hermetic centrifugal liquid chiller manual, titled 'Start-up, Operation, and Maintenance Instructions' in both Chinese and English. It features a photograph of the chiller unit and a line drawing of its internal components, along with manufacturer information.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "Carrier logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "19XR series title"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Manual title (Chinese and English)"},
    {"type": "photograph", "label": "Chiller unit photograph"},
    {"type": "line_drawing", "label": "Chiller internal components line drawing"},
    {"type": "badge", "label": "HFC-134a badge"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Manufacturer name (Chinese and English)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Website watermark"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Chiller unit photograph", "relation": "shows", "to": "Evergreen compressor"},
    {"from": "Line drawing", "relation": "overlays", "to": "Chiller unit photograph"},
    {"from": "HFC-134a badge", "relation": "points to", "to": "Line drawing"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["equipment_identification", "manual_documentation", "manufacturer_information"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "Carrier\n19XR 系列高效封闭型离心式冷水机组\nHermetic Centrifugal Liquid Chillers\n开机、运行和维护说明书\nStart-up, Operation, and Maintenance Instructions\nEvergreen\nHFC-134a\n上海合众－开利空调设备有限公司\nSHANGHAI HEZHONG-CARRIER AIR-CONDITIONING EQUIP. CO., LTD.\n制冷百家网整理：www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact spatial relationship between the line drawing and the photograph is not explicitly defined; the drawing appears as an overlay. The specific components in the line drawing are not labeled.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}
